title: Update tool path expansion to resolve against CWD
summary: Update tool path expansion logic so all tool paths resolve relative to CWD via the centralized resolver.
acceptance_criteria: All tool path expansions resolve relative to CWD (e.g., CWD/.agent).
No direct path expansion remains outside the centralized resolver.
Behavior is consistent across all tools using filesystem paths.

steps.description: Identify tool call sites that expand or build filesystem paths.
Update call sites to use the centralized resolver for all tool paths.
Validate that paths now resolve relative to CWD in all tools.

notes: Keep the change minimal and focused on path expansion behavior.
